content.text: Track deployment target decisions. Do not invent finality if unresolved.
Understood.
Proposal A: deploy API to region eu-west-1 because latency looked best.
Recorded proposal A.
Counterpoint: compliance may require eu-central-1; legal has not decided. No final region yet.
Recorded unresolved compliance blocker.
